artPrompt: An evocative midnight-revival scene of ashen-robed congregants kneeling around a guttering candle, hands raised in fervor as tumbling dice and a spinning coin hover above them wreathed in cold gold halo-light that pours down as healing radiance. A vast clock tower looms in the blood-dark sky. The worshippers anchor the base, the blessing rising up the wide frame. Wide 4:3 landscape, bone white and deep black, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Blessed Are the Gamblers
text:
Whenever you roll one or more dice or flip one or more coins, you gain 2 life. Faith rewards the brave and the reckless equally.
Whenever an opponent rolls one or more dice or flips one or more coins, put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock. Their luck is our omen.
flavorText: "Blessed are the gamblers, for they shall hasten the end and tip generously."

extras.interaction: profits from all gambling, opponent rolls feed the clock
